title: Dogfood Policy
description: Per-repo or global policy defining verification rules. Global policy provides defaults and non-overridable rules. Repo policies define surface-specific requirements.

repo.description: Full org/repo. Absent in global policy.

surfaces.description: Per-surface policy. Keys are product_surface values.

defaults.description: Default surface policy. Used when a surface has no explicit policy.

global_rules.description: Non-overridable rules. Only meaningful in global policy. Repo policies cannot weaken these.

id.description: Stable rule ID for reporting and diagnostics.

severity.description: reject: fails verification. warn: accepted with warning. info: logged only.

stale_thresholds.description: Days since last accepted dogfood record. Used by CLI and indexes.

healthy.description: Days within which the repo is considered healthy (green).

required_scenarios.description: Scenario IDs that must have a recent accepted record.

max_age_days.description: Maximum days since last accepted run before the surface is stale.

warn_age_days.description: Days since last accepted run before warning.

allowed.description: Which execution modes are accepted for this surface.

coverage_min.description: Minimum coverage percentage. Null means no coverage gate.

tests_must_pass.description: Whether all CI test checks must pass.

required_kinds.description: Evidence kinds that must be present.

min_evidence_count.description: Minimum number of evidence items across all scenarios.
